title: Glasstech, Inc. - Privacy Policy
contentHtml:
Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 4, 2026

Glasstech, Inc. respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information when you visit glasstech.com or contact us through the website.

Information We Collect

We may collect information that you choose to provide, such as your name, company name, email address, telephone number, mailing address, and the contents of messages submitted through contact or request forms.

We may also collect basic technical information about visits to our website, such as browser type, device information, referring pages, pages viewed, date and time of access, and general usage information. This information helps us operate, maintain, and improve the website.

How We Use Information

We use information to respond to inquiries, provide requested information about our products and services, support customer communications, improve website content and performance, and protect the security and reliability of our systems.

Sharing of Information

We do not sell personal information. We may share information with service providers who help us operate the website or support our business, when required by law, or when necessary to protect our rights, safety, or property.

Data Security

We use reasonable administrative, technical, and physical safeguards designed to protect information.

Links to Other Websites

Our website may contain links to third-party websites. Glasstech, Inc. is not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those websites.

Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through our Contact Us page or by mail at Glasstech, Inc., Perrysburg, Ohio, USA.
